entry.title: Re: Flexnet Publisher runs out of Support
entry.content:
Hello,

The upcoming SySAM 2.5 is scheduled to be released in PD 16.7 SP09, which is expected to be around the end of June.
Please note that timelines can sometimes change, and delays may occur.
You can find this information also in KBA 3583186 that SAP published today.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: FP2502 Client crash - session timed out.
entry.content: You should raise an issue to support.

entry.title: Re: Fetching Tax Categories from Sales org in sap mdg BP
entry.content: Since CL_MDG_BS_ECC_BP_CHECK_SERVICE -> DFLT_TAX_IND_READ_BY_VKORG has performance issues due to nested loops and multiple SELECTs, pleaase consider to try using CL_MDG_BS_BP_SERVICES for optimized data retrieval. If feasible, replace multiple SELECTs with a single CDS View or AMDP for better performance and implement parallelization if multiple sales orgs are involved.

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content: Hi Andrzej, the best is to open an influence request to get support for this scenario.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Mon...
entry.content: Ok I see what you mean it says for your "Private Cloud" system - this is likely a typo - I will follow up internally as this should be corrected but please create a support ticket indicating the documentation has the error. It should not mention anything about private in a public cloud setup guide.

entry.title: Re: How can I create a report in Crystal Reports that dis...
entry.content:
Turn on the Detail section option of 'Format with Multiple Columns'.  Please search the online help for the topic of ''Layout tab (Section Expert)":
------------------------------------
"The Layout tab appears when you have the details section selected and the Format with Multiple Columns box is checked on the Common tab.

Use the Layout tab to set up your report in a multi-column format. That is, instead of having the data print straight down the page, you can set up multiple columns and have the data flow from column to column. You can also have your data print across then down the page, printing one record in each column, then printing a second record in each column, then a third, and so on. The dialog box is divided into four smaller boxes... "

entry.title: Re: SOST emails sent from which program
entry.content: You have to activate the SCOT trace before sending the email.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to reset Cumulative Received Quantitie...
entry.content:
SAP does not store a direct "Cumulative GR Qty" field in schedule lines as I know. So, you should calculate it from GR postings for the item (e.g., via MSEG table).
Only "Agreed Cumulative Quantity" can be reset, not actual GR Qty, because this requires normally to defining a new baseline before resetting.
It does not reset historical GR quantities, so helps align supplier and SAP records but does not erase past GR data.

If a full reset is needed, custom logic or reports would be required.

entry.title: Re: SCU3 logs are showing TR number in upper landscapes when moving through TR
entry.content:
I'm not sure to understand "username field". Could you post a screenshot please?

Also, are you saying that you want the SCU3 logging to log the transports of customizing? I thought that SCU3 is to see only the changes done by classic transactions (implying ABAP Open SQL insert/modify/update/delete statements), only in the system where they are executed.

entry.title: Re: Calculation View Input Parameter Order Not Respected...
entry.content:
Analysis for Office does not always respect the order of input parameters from the Calculation View, as I know. So the sequence is typically controlled by the backend metadata handling, not the Calculation View itself.

A possible workaround could be to use a Prompt Group in AO – Define a grouped prompt to control the order and rename Parameters – Prefix names (e.g., A_StartDate, B_EndDate) to influence the order. Check AO Query Execution – Ensure the query retrieves parameters in the correct sequence.

entry.title: User Content
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We want to use SAP IPS for user provisioning to Cloud Apps (SAC, Enable Now...)

What happens to the content of users when these users are automatically deleted (e.g., in SAC) via IPS in these apps?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Aplicação MP 1.171/2023 - Desconto simplificado IRRF
entry.content:
Bom dia!

Veja que após essa nota foi fixado no programa que o INSS deve ter o codigo oficial la na configuraçao como INSS e não como 2100 que normalmente a gente atribui. Está fixado no programa que o INSS tem esse código oficial 'INSS' sem isso o IRRF fica errado pois não é deduzido da base.

 

Att 

Demóstenes

entry.title: Re: Which YCOA Account to Select for Planned Cost in Proj...
entry.content:
There is no standard or system requirements for which accounts you use for project accounting.  It all depends on the level of granularity needed.

Review with the finance and accounting department the chart of accounts and the use of the expense accounts they have defined.  This will tell you what accounts to use.

Also review the configuration to see what accounts will be used for the actual costs and revenues.  You can plan against those as well.  

The accounts you use should reflect the cost types in whatever planning tool you are using.

entry.title: Re: Retrieve characteristic values from the table for the...
entry.content:
Did you 

  • Consider using BAPI such as BAPI_OBJCL_GETDETAIL or relevant classes?
  • Look at tables such as CABN, CAWN, CAWNT... and key fields as ADZHL, ATZGL, ATWRT, ATINN...
  • Run a sql trace during usage of standard transaction

entry.title: Re: Print file zebra with SAP
entry.content: Did you already try to use send .PRN or .ZPL files directly to a Zebra printer using SAP?

entry.title: Re: Extend Odata service for fiori app - Pick Outbound De...
entry.content:
You should be able to enhance the DELIVERYHEADER_GET_ENTITY method to include deliveries with batches. Since no direct extensibility via Custom Fields and Logic is available, you needs to create an extension for LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PICK. Use SEGW to redefine DELIVERYHEADER_GET_ENTITY and modify the logic to remove the batch exclusion condition in the standard filter.

Use BAdI BADI_LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PICK (if available) or alternatively, use an implicit enhancement in the standard method. If the frontend app also filters batches, adjust logic in LE_SHP_PICKS1.

After implementing, register and test the service to ensure the changes reflect in Fiori.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori catalog not loading
entry.content:
Hello, Fabio!

Thanks a lot for the help.

I checked the tcode /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and all the services are there.

Then I went to STC01 and ran "SAP_FIORI_LAUNCHPAD_INIT_SETUP" But it returned some errors, like:

I tried to activate the ICF node in the /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE transaction, but it is simply not available on my system:

When I try to "Insert service", the system cuts some options for me, either checking the flag or putting LOCAL

I appreciate all the help so far.

Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠

entry.title: Redefine or Extend FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER
entry.content: I want to Redefine FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER in order to extend the entity sets to add some fields, but when I try to edit FDP_EF_PURCHASE_ORDER I get a message that editing is prohibited because its SAP standard. But according to the SAP help SAP Help and blogs Blogs I should be able to do it? What am I missing?

entry.title: Re: Belize for WebUI not showing up in Theme Workbench SA...
entry.content:
Hi @m_finn_bpc 

It might be that themes like Belize and Horizon are usually not stored under the old BSP path /SAP/BC/BSP/SAP/thtmlb_styles/sap_skins/like classic themes. Instead, they are part of the SAP UI5/Theming Infrastructure, which is handled by SAPUI5 or Fiori Launchpad in modern systems. 

SAP Note 1849835 recommends using the Theme Workbench CRMC_UI_THEME for custom logo replacement. But in your case it seems that both are not visible. Thus, I would try to do the following steps:

  1. Go to Transaction: BSP_WD_CMPWB
  2. Component: CRMCMP_IC_FRAME
  3. Navigate to the view/controller handling the header or branding area (e.g., HeaderAreaView)
  4. Use custom CSS to override the logo via HTML/CSS injection (avoid modifying standard objects directly).
  5. Store the custom image in your own BSP application or use a MIME repository path.

I hope it helps

entry.title: Re: Step-By-Step Guide: Google Sheets API Integration in SAP CPI via Open Connectors
entry.content: Very good detailed explanation. Can you please do another open connector integration like Google drive or Hubspot CRM, Salesforce.

entry.title: Simplifying SAP Note Implementation with TCI for Electronic Documents
entry.content:
We're excited to announce the release of Transport-Based Correction Instructions (TCI) for electronic document processing, a game-changer for implementing SAP Notes. TCI streamlines the process, making it faster and more efficient.

What is TCI?

Transport-Based Correction Instructions (TCI) are pre-packaged solutions that bundle multiple SAP Notes into a single transport request. This approach eliminates the need for manual SAP Note implementation, reducing complexity and saving time.

New TCIs available for electronic documents

Electronic communication integration framework

3559476 - Transport based Correction Instructions (TCI) for the Electronic Communication Integration Framework

  • This TCI includes all SAP Notes published before December 31, 2024, for packages GLO_GEN_GCO_COMMUNICATION and GLO_GEN_GCO_COMMUNICATION_AIF.
  • Application component: CA-GTF-CSC-DRC-COM
  • Supported releases:
    • S4CORE: Versions 104 to 108
    • SAP_APPL: Version 606 (SP12), 617 (SP05), and 618 (initial support package)

Electronic document processing framework

3545430 - Transport-Based Correction Instructions (TCI) for the Electronic Document Processing Framework

  • This TCI includes the following:
    • Framework SAP Notes up to Framework 36
    • Inbound Message Handler
    • Customer Invoice (Peppol and via E-Mail) core components
    • Supplier Invoice (Peppol and via E-Mail) core components
    • Peppol Customer Invoice (Austria, Belgium, Germany, Denmark, Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, Ireland, Poland)
    • Peppol Supplier Invoice (Received by E-Mail) for Germany
  • Supported releases:
    • S4CORE: Versions 104 to 108
    • SAP_APPL: Version 606 (SP12), 617 (SP05), and 618 (initial support package)

Why TCI matters

TCI implementation simplifies the process, ensuring that your systems are up-to-date with the latest SAP Notes without the hassle of manual updates.

Give us your feedback

To ensure that we’re covering what you need, please leave your feedback at the bottom of this blog post!

#SAPGoGlobal #SAPLocalization

entry.title: Re: HANA XSA Fiori-Elements
entry.content: Currently, WebIDE for HANA XSA only supports the Fiori List Report template with OData v2, as SAP's Fiori Elements for OData v4 is mainly designed for SAP BTP, as I know.

entry.title: Re: About sap b1 sdk use
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Try to change the way you bind the matrix column to the datasource:

column.DataBind.SetBound(true, "dt", "u_t001");

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: About sap b1 sdk use
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Try to change the way you bind the matrix column to the datasource:

column.DataBind.SetBound(true, "dt", "u_t001");

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: MM17 Security Question
entry.content:
Hello,
Can you please confirmed that by the solution that worked in this situation was:
i) Enabling S_TABU_DIS to YES in SU24 for MM17 tcode.
ii) Creating an authorization group in SE54 and assigning it table MARC to it and mainting this authorization group in S_TABU_DIS in the role.

Was it by doing these 2 steps, you were able to restrict modification be made only in table MARC and fields from MARC in MM17 tcode ?

Thanks and Kind Regards,
Narvada

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Sales
entry.content: You can try to use a popup in VA01/VA02 via user exit (USEREXIT_MOVE_FIELD_TO_VBAK) to allow manual selection of material and color.

entry.title: Re: what report gives the lots in QI inspection including...
entry.content: You can try to use MB52 or QA33 to check materials in Quality Inspection stock along with the receiving date.

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate agreement for a single customer based on...
entry.content: Hi @gvictor also one more question, is it possible at the final settlement to manually enter a fixed amount, which will get distributed/allocated per SKU quantity and customer?

entry.content:
Hello,

 

In General Settings -> BP Folder, check the following:

entry.title: Re: The YELLOW exclamation point in the projection of SAP...
entry.content: The yellow exclamation marks indicate that the fields are not mapped or recognized correctly in the projection node.

entry.title: Re: ALV Hide zero in certain row
entry.content:
Hi,

Proposal : Use (not only color but) style with ALV_STYLE_CHECKBOX_NO  '00060000'  from INCLUDE <CL_ALV_CONTROL>. 

Regards
 Pierre

entry.title: Re: SAP Change Document(CD): Special Scenarios with SOLMAN (Solution Manager)
entry.content:
Regarding scenario 1:

I’ll first admit to not understanding the potential “need to segregate objects from a released transport request”, however …

The configuration of development, QA, and production systems should be as much alike as possible. Leaving latent changes in the development system could have unintended consequences, for example, by causing a delay in future development by needing to address those changes at that time, or worse, by inadvertently being promoted to production.

Changes should not be made in the development system if they’re not intended to move to production. If a change is made that isn’t needed, it should be reversed, so there’s no net effect, and the transport(s) promoted through the landscape. Regression testing is important in this case.

And, to borrow a phrase, CSOL is a feature, not a bug. 😀
See also the SAP Help, Change Control Management CSOL document:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/4bde117de5963c31e10000000a42189b.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Graphical View , calculated column, multiple...
entry.content:
SAP HANA Calculated Columns do not support direct wildcard filtering with multiple values like "1001*,1002*,1003*".

May a possible workaround could be to use CASE or IF conditions:

CASE
WHEN COLUMN LIKE '1001%' OR COLUMN LIKE '1002%' OR COLUMN LIKE '1003%'
THEN 'Match'
ELSE 'No Match'
END

If using Input Parameters, consider dynamic SQL or a filter node with multiple OR conditions.

entry.title: Re: JS engine in XS hana classic
entry.content: As I know, the SAP HANA XS Classic uses SpiderMonkey (Mozilla’s JS Engine), but the ECMAScript version depends on the HANA SPS version. Generally, it supports ES5 features, with limited ES6 support in later SPS versions.

entry.title: EWM monitor Physical stock remove Exclude resource checkbox
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 

Is there anyway to remove exclude resource check box by default  in /SCWM/MON, so when user runs physical stock, it shows stock on resource as well

entry.title: Re: Any solution?
entry.content: For what exactly?

entry.title: Re: Service Layer doesn't trigger Approval SAP B1
entry.content: Hi , i already activated it , and shared the screen on my post .

entry.title: Re: ADRC number for a plant is same in both the clients
entry.content:
The ADRC number (ADRNR) is being reused across clients, causing address mismatches after transport. This happens because ADRNR is client-independent in some cases.
To fix it, may you can try to use a Client-Specific ADRC Approach, so ensure addresses are stored with client dependency to avoid conflicts. If ADRNR is externally assigned, consider using a different range per client. After transport, verify and update the address in the target client if needed. Implement logic to ensure unique ADRNR assignment per client.

This should prevents plants from inheriting incorrect addresses after transport.

entry.title: Re: What are the cases where homogenous graph and heterog...
entry.content: Homogeneous graphs in SAP HANA are used when all nodes are of the same type, like a social network of users, offering better performance due to simpler relationships. Heterogeneous graphs, with different node types (e.g., suppliers, products, customers), enable more complex analyses but require more processing power. Use homogeneous graphs for straightforward networks and heterogeneous graphs for deeper, multi-entity insights.

entry.title: Re: How to set rounding for picking only a full HU or bag...
entry.content:
Hello,

you can set this up on the following levels:

Warehouse process type:

Storage type:

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: S4 Hana Standard Change and Prerequisites
entry.content: SAP does not provide a fixed list of standard changes, as they depend on company-specific configurations. Common examples include creating a storage location, which requires a storage location code, description, and plant, or setting up a new tax code with details like tax type, rate, country, and reference code. For a full overview, check SAP IMG (SPRO) or Solution Manager documentation.

entry.title: Re: "Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP L...
entry.content:
Hi Omar, I can confirm the same on LeanIX provided credentials don't work.

Thanks

Kannan

entry.title: Re: remove space at end of the target field MAT_PLANT in...
entry.content:
To remove leading/trailing spaces:

  • In HANA runtime you can use the TRIM function.
  • In ABAP runtime you can use CONDENSE.

What exactly is your code? What is the result?

Is that really a space (hex 20) in the end or just a non-printable character?

entry.title: Re: Intrastat not showing automatic CN
entry.content:
Automatic credit notes for price corrections are not included in Intrastat dispatches or receipts because they do not relate to physical goods movement.
Intrastat only captures transactions involving the actual transfer of goods. To include these CNs, check if the billing type used is mapped correctly in Intrastat configuration (transaction VI98) or consider manually adjusting Intrastat reports.

entry.title: Re: LOAD INVOICES WITH PURCHASE ORDER THROUGH APP "IMPORT SUPPLIER INVOICES".
entry.content: Hi Gary, in the upload excel template I dont see any field for "purchasing document Ref". Can you please let me know the correct excel cell where the PO number can be entered?

entry.title: Re: HOW TO ADD NEW FIELD IN EXISTED CUBE AT TRANSFORMATIO...
entry.content:
Hi

 

How exactly do you plan to load the newly added field, if you are not mapping it in the TRFN?

If you don't map it in the Transformation, then in the next load no values will be updated. Also there is a Lookup ruletype for transformations:

Read from DataStore Object

 

For adding new characteristics to Infocubes with specific rules, check the document:

Remodeling an Infocube

It offers you to write a customer exit to fill the values into the newly added characteristic the way you like it.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Re: SAC and Group Reporting Implementation Timing
entry.content:
Hi,

Group reporting go live month usually decided by your consolidation life cycle activities. In majority of the case, you start the first period of your consolidation group close activity when system goes live. 

When considering SAC and Group reporting, you need to consider the factor how is the data flow designed. Either SAC feeds data to GR to have planned version consolidated. Or GR feeds SAC to plan on the consolidated data. 

I'm not sure which company you are from. SAP has Premium Engagement team who provides MaxAttention Service, they will address all these type of questions in detail and provide recommendations.

Recommend reaching out to your TQM for more details.

Thanks,

Dana

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Release Universal Journal not available for some periods
entry.content: Hi, I'm facing the same issue..totally the same. How did you solved?

entry.title: Re: "Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP L...
entry.content: We are looking into this issue and will come back to you with a solution as soon as possible.

entry.title: BAS Basic List Report without Data, but Excel Download is possible
entry.content:
Hello experts, I am currently designing my first own app in BAS (Eclipse) and have decided on a list report. When I go to the app preview, the app loads fine, but unfortunately I don't get any data displayed in the list report.

There is an error message: No data found
Try adjusting the search or filter criteria.


But when I click on the Excel download I get a list full of the expected values. Have I set something wrong?
Regards
Niels

entry.title: Re: ADRC number for a plant is same in both the clients
entry.content: There is a KBA on this topic, read 3393039 - Company code or plant address is incorrect after transport (with some procedure to prevent, transport and repair inconsistencies in Customizing addresses)

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Edition: Email status 'sent' in app: Mon...
entry.content: FYI - the 1LQ has now been updated (quick reaction by the product team!)

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Security Concepts and Best Practice
entry.content:
Hello @Matthew_Shaw ,

Thank you for this blog and the useful information.

I have a question: we want to use IPS for user provisioning to SAC. In SAC, we have different teams (about 20 teams). Users within these teams should receive different roles. In this blog, it is recommended to assign a role to a team.

What would you recommend in this case, when users within a team need to have different roles?

Is it possible to automatically assign roles to users, rather than teams, using IPS or SAML?

 

Many Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Manual assignments not reinstated once user returns from leave
entry.content:
We noticed that when a user goes on leave (and becomes inactive in SuccessFactors), all assignments are wiped from their profile.

When the user comes back, anything that was assigned with an assignment profile is reassigned to the user, but anything manually assigned is not.

Has anybody found a way of managing this?

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Release Universal Journal not avail...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I'm facing the same issue. How did you solved?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to reach out to SAP Education - Learning Hub team for support
entry.content: I'm also not able to see my past certification. UID already setup properly with the S-Number I certified with and a linked backup email. CIC chat agent confirmed that it was setup properly so I created a Support Case this Monday and still haven't received a response today Friday.

entry.title: How to report on items removed from the user's learning history upon their profile being deactivated
entry.content:
We have noticed that a user goes on leave (becomes inactive), items that were manually assigned to the user are removed from their learning history and are not reassigned to them upon their return (becomes active).

We need to report on the user's full learning history, to include the items removed from his learning history (and not reassigned upon his return).

We have tried the User Learning Plan Audit Report, which typically shows items removed from the user's learning history, but it did not show the items that had been manually assigned to the user (before the user went on leave).

Has anyone found a report that provides a full learning history, even of items that had been manually assigned and later removed from the history?

entry.title: Cascading Budget and Planner Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello,

When using the Direct Amount / Cascading Budget feature in the Compensation module, are the managers assigned to budget amounts automatically the planners? Or can Roll-up or Compensation Manager Hierarchy (Second Managers) be used in conjunction with budget assignments? Managers without a budget are still allowed to make recommendations.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content: Thank you so much, it worked for me.

entry.title: Re: Invoke Generative AI Hub Models using @sap-ai-sdk/ai-api library in BAS
entry.content:
I am not proficient with JavaScript. I looked into https://github.com/SAP/ai-sdk-js/blob/1f7b857b49da02604f6b9b2539956de881c6c5cf/sample-code/src/ai-api/scenario-api.ts#L27 to see if that's the API you are looking for: https://api.sap.com/api/AI_CORE_API/path/scenario.query_models?

Regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Re: Which Currency Should Be Used for Uploading Cost and...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can you please check of the following KBA assists?

2821766 - Import transaction currency value with App Import Financial Plan Data

There is also the following Help documentation -

How to Import Financial Plan Data

where it provides - 

  • Currencies: The system behavior depends on the currency you have used in your source file.

    • If you entered the plan amounts as amounts (HSL) in Company Code Currency (RHCUR) or as amounts (KSL) in Controlling Area Currency (RKCUR):

      The app copies one of these amounts to amounts (WSL) in Transaction Currency (RWCUR):

      • 1. Priority: the amounts (CO_OSL) in Company Code Currency (RCO_OCUR).

      • 2. Priority: the amounts (HSL) in Company Code Currency (RHCUR).

      • 3. Priority: the amounts (KSL)in Controlling Area Currency (RKCUR)

    • If you entered or derived the plan amounts as amounts (WSL) in Transaction Currency (RWCUR):

      The app converts these amounts into amounts (HSL) in Company Code Currency (RHCUR) and amounts (KSL) in Controlling Area Currency (RKCUR).

I hope this helps. 

Best regards,

Sean

entry.title: SAP IBP – Automatically Copy Values Within the Same Key Figure for Different Products
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working with SAP IBP and need to automatically copy values within the same key figure (KF X) from Product A to Product B. The requirement is that this process must be fully automated, meaning no manual adjustments via Excel.

Requirements:

  • Copy values within the same key figure
  • From Product A to Product B
  • No manual intervention (Excel is not an option)
  • No Data Realignment
  • Ideally, the solution should use standard IBP functionalities, such as Forecast Models or other possible approaches

Approaches I have considered so far:

  1. Master Data Rules – Not possible in this case.
  2. Copy Past Periods Forecast Model – Not sure how to configure this approach for my scenario.

I would appreciate any guidance or best practices on how to configure this in IBP. Has anyone successfully implemented a similar requirement?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Hello everyone! We are integrating scripts for SAP Digital Manufacturing.
entry.content:
Hello everyone! We are doing a script integration for SAP Digital Manufacturing, using #POIM and #DRFOUNT. However, it shows the following error in DM:

" 400 Bad Request - {"code":"standardValueTarget.notFound","message":"Standard value targets not found.","correlationId":"81eec77d-ca73-4765-988d-3587f27deb40","details":null}

Can anyone suggest a way?

Thanks!

entry.title: Authentication methods CPI DS Agent
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

I need to use CPI DS agent to set up integration between on prem system and IBP . What all authentication methods does CPI DS agent support for its connectivity to on prem . I want to avoid maintaining the credential on DS  on the cloud .. Can we have a oAuth connection between the DS Agent in the DMZ and on prem system ?Is there any documentation that I could follow for this scenario ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Change Document(CD): Special Scenarios with SOLMAN (Solution Manager)
entry.content:
@Dave_S : In large organizations with multiple teams, such as Project A (Phoenix) and Project B (Helux), situations may arise where both teams need to work on the same object, with priority assigned to one team over the other. In such cases, segregation is essential to prevent conflicts and ensure smooth development processes

Reversing changes is necessary when a modification is no longer required. However, until these changes are fully reverted, other teams may be unable to access or modify the affected object due to existing dependencies.

 

While CSOL is a valuable feature for preventing simultaneous modifications and potential conflicts, there are exceptional situations where manual intervention is required. In such special scenarios, it may be necessary to bypass/remove CSOL.

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager GIS
entry.content:
Hi Experts! 

 

I have a question regarding the SAM x GIS integration. i understand that the feature layers is created in GIS and appears on SAM. But is there some integration of SAP x GIS that we input the coordinates in GIS of some equipments that already are created in SAP but without location, and we can visualize in SAM Map the equipment? 

Or the integration SAM and GIS is just for the feature layers and for SAP business Object we can just create in SAM Map?

 

Best Regard,

 

Rafael Eij Umeda

SAP Service and Asset Manager

entry.title: Re: Attach excel xlsx file to email using cl_bcs and send to MS Outlook recipient
entry.content:
Do we have solution for this? I am facing the same issue since we have some changes in M365 outlooks. My SOST shows correct filename, but outlooks show the header as my filename instead of subject. I am using CL_Document_BCS.

In example BCS_EXAMPLE_7 - header is not passed to the method. When I test this program it shows the SOST and Outlook attachment with same name. I have commented the header( i_attachment_header ) line in my Add attachment method. Now my SOST and Outlook file shows the same name.

entry.title: Hosting a BusinessOne webclient extension with a PHP backend in BTP
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have developed a vertical add-on for SAP BusinessOne that has a Fiori UI5 frontend and a PHP backend (using Laravel) and we're looking into adapting it to run as a Webclient Extension hosted on the BTP.

We have been reviewing documentation, courses, tutorials, and sample projects and while we mostly understand the process and the steps outlined, we’ve noticed that they largely assume the use of SAP Business Application Studio (or SAP Build Code) and/or a Node.js backend, often incorporating the SAP CAP programming model.

However, we have invested countless hours into developing several vertical add-ons in PHP, so a full conversion from PHP to Node.js is not a feasible option for us. Ideally, we’d like to keep most of our existing PHP backend.

Our main question is whether keeping our existing PHP services is a realistic approach. If so, we would greatly appreciate any relevant documentation - whether in the form of a course, sample project, tutorial, or any other resource - that could guide us in the right direction.

A couple of examples of our known challenges right now are:

1. Running our php service in the Cloud Foundry environment, as the php build pack doesn't include some extensions that are required by the laravel framework (such as OpenSSL).

2. Implementing SSO (or even principal propagation). We have sucessfully made requests to the ServiceLayer straight from the frontend because the webclient provides a SESSION cookie, but we need to be able to perform these requests in our backend, reusing the Service Layer session from the webclient so that the requests are done with the same user that logged on to the webclient.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Method 'CREATE_STREAM' not implemented in data provid...
entry.content:
Hello again i was able to use the file upload feature only on Odata v4 and i did it by following the below links

Start by following this blog for implemting the file upload feature

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/streams-in-rap-uploading-pdf-excel-and-other-files-in-rap-application/ba-p/13526891

In OData V4 we have to enable the draft or we will not be able to view the create button, so enable the draft by following this blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/understanding-and-using-draft-tables-in-sap-s-rap-model/ba-p/13882473

After applying everything try and check if it work, if it doesn't and you face this error 
Virus scan profile /IWBEP/V4/ODATA_UPLOAD is not active
Refer to this Note 3010735 - F4111 - Virus scan profile /IWBEP/V4/ODATA_UPLOAD is not active

 

Best of luck everyone.

entry.title: Define Priorities in Maintenance Management, S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm implementing SAP S/4HANA Asset Management, Public Cloud Edition.

In the different configuration options available through Central Business Configuration, there is one called 'Define Priorities for Each Priority Type.':

What I need to know is whether there is a configuration point where each Priority Type is associated with a Notification Type and an Order Type, given that both notifications and orders have date fields. If not, do I have to understand that the Priority Type Y1 is always assigned to both the Notification Type Y1 and the Order Type YA01? In this case, when is the system intended to use the Priority Type G0?

Additionally, I understand that new Priority Types cannot be defined and that only the standard ones provided by the system can be used.

Grateful for your reply in advance.

entry.title: Re: Copy Values within same KF with different Product ID
entry.content: Hi , Thanks for your input! I see your point about using attribute transformation with a custom MDT to store the "From → To" relationship for product mapping. However, in this case, I don’t think this approach is suitable for copying key figure values within the same key figure for a different Product ID. Why Attribute Transformation is not the right solution here: 🔹 Attribute Transformations are designed for master data, not transactional key figure values. They work well when modifying attributes (e.g., assigning categories or flags) but don’t perform direct key figure value copies. 🔹 Using a custom MDT with a reference ID does not solve the issue of copying values within the same key figure. The planning area still expects the key figure values to be assigned at the original product level, and additional logic would be needed to ensure correct mapping. 🔹 Cyclic dependencies and planning area activation issues. As you mentioned, if KF1 is used as a source for KF2, we can’t use KF2 as a source to update back KF1. This further complicates the process and introduces unnecessary complexity. Why Realignment Makes More Sense If the requirement is ad-hoc, then realignment rules are the best option. They are designed to reassign key figure values based on a mapping table and work within the same key figure without needing additional logic. Would you agree that realignment is the best approach for this use case, or do you see another potential method that aligns better with SAP IBP's capabilities? Thanks for your insights! Best regards, Kacper

entry.title: Re: Native driver not recognised
entry.content:
Every Windows Server comes with a basic SQL SERVER client driver suitable for ODBC connections.

For SAP you need to install this driver: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=56041

Native client is no longer distributed with the SQL SERVER.

entry.title: Re: Intrastat not showing automatic CN
entry.content: Thank you Hakan,

entry.title: Re: Difference in SAP Integration Suite for SAP SuccessFactors Solution Suite std edition
entry.content: Hi, I have a question: what the difference in integration with "other systems" and "external system"?By other systems do you mean other SAP systems (e.g. S/4)?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori catalog not loading
entry.content: That is weird but please notice the following. You must select a service first to check the ICF nodes section. Please try again by selecting the the INTEROP service. However the other errors in STC01 might indicate some inconsistency or lack of authorization in SICF. By the way, when seaching nodes in SICF do not use the "Technical Service Name". Instead use the "External service name". All services in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE are under the path /sap/opu/odata so you can inspect them manually without any filters by manually expanding the tree.

entry.title: Re: Calculating Energy Consumption in the Product Carbon Footprint
entry.content:
Hi User931,

In our demo we also did what Klaus described and use Internal Service Confirmations (Coming from Activities in Production Order Confirmations) mapped to a resource via an Energy Flow Model to assign gas usage to the PCF, see this example.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori catalog not loading
entry.content: The same thing for when registering services. You asked about the INTEROP service but are trying to register something called ZCA_CO* - that's is not the same thing

entry.title: Re: Intrastat not showing automatic CN
entry.content: Thank you Hakan, but the problem exists. as reporting those credit notes is legal requirement not only in Latvia but for example also in Germany. So basically it would mean that SAP Intrastat dispatches report is not in line with legal requirement.

entry.title: Re: Transition from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM...
entry.content: This post is not a question.  Inserting 'answer' here to remove from unanswered questions listing.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content: Thx for the fast reply and actions. Everything looking good now. Was able to update my 4.3 installation with BI2025 and it worked although I have it running on windows server 2019 which doesn't seem to a be supported OS but ok, can't have everything.

entry.title: MM_PUR_S4_PR~MODIFY_ITEM Contract for limit missing in importing parameters
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am implementing a BAdI enhancement for Purchase Requisitions (PRs) and need to update the Fixed Supplier field with the supplier from the Contract for Limit.

For the SAP GUI, I have implemented the logic in IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM, and it works correctly in ME51N—the Fixed Supplier field is properly populated.

However, I am facing an issue in the Manage Purchase Requisition Professional (F2229) app. While the BAdI executes when creating a PR in this app, the Fixed Supplier field is not immediately updated in the UI. The correct value appears only after navigating back to the PR header and then returning to the item level. It seems that the update is not reflected in the draft mode in real time.

I explored using MM_PUR_S4_PR~MODIFY_ITEM to handle this, but the Contract for Limit field is not available in the importing structure (as shown in the attached image).

Could you please advise on how to resolve this? I feel like I’ve searched everywhere for a solution without success.

I would greatly appreciate any guidance, suggestions, or alternative approaches.

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards,
Veronika

entry.title: Report for unsubmitted time sheets
entry.content:
Hello, I need a report that shows me all of the unsubmitted time sheets for a specific date range. Is there a way to do this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Re: PGR not happening while doing the sale return
entry.content:
First you need to convert the special sale order stock to unrestricted for which, if you try to create a return delivery against a return order, system will throw an error saying ""Special Stock E not supported""

For that, in OVZI, you have to change the settings for the item category in such a way that for REN, 1 should be assigned under the tab "Origin / Source Requirement Type". Once you do this, system will allow you to do PGR and take the stocks to either quality or unrestricted depending upon Business needs.

entry.title: Re: SAP Profile Generation "Merge" function
entry.content:
Hello there,

We`re having the same issue. Have you found a solution in the meantime?

Thank you,

Mihai

entry.title: Re: US Payroll - PSD code selection (payroll & W2)
entry.content:
The main program that evaluates the payroll results for US Tax Reporter is RPCTRCU0.  I see some Pennsylvania specific routines like process_wages_pa_act_32 where the program comments also say...

* The Pennsylvania Act 32 requires that wages in W-2 be reported
* to the locality to where taxes are remitted. This routine is
* responsible for cumulating the payroll results based on the

Is it that you believe the amount should not have been taken?  Not reported? or reported in a different location on the W-2.  It could be that you need to back up a step and look at how the payroll result was calculated.

The tax form configuration is under IMG step Payroll: USA -> Tax Reporter -> Define original tax forms and/or Tax Form Groups.  The technical name of the W-2 is HR_F_W2.  Income tax (type 01) is usually reported with Tax Form Field T001.

entry.title: Re: Optimising Warehouse Automation: SAP EWM Integration with WCS/WES
entry.content: Very useful and nicely articulated.

entry.title: Re: LV61A081 LV61A082 - pricing date vs billing date
entry.content:
SAP note 1256361 should address this issue for sure.  In case, you still have an issue, ensure, the routines 82 & 333 are set as per SAP note 2555008. 

With all these settings, still, it is not working, then, before going for any custom validation, raise a ticket with SAP by referring note 1256361 has not solved your issue.  They will guide you

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Boost Development with GenAI in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Here is the link https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?BA=000D3ABE796A1EDCA2CF8D5EAA180EB6&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=000D3AAC9DD21EECB7E346D12054E893

entry.title: Re: Export S4 hana data as a file to GCS using datasphere
entry.content:
Of course - you can use Replication Flows to do so.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/be5967d099974c69b77f4549425ca4c0/aec242c29188408c9ebe1a3ab63ce28b.html#loioaec242c29188408c9ebe1a3ab63ce28b__GCS_usage

Bear in mind that this involves Premium Outbound Integration costs!

entry.title: Parallel crcy area (crcy type 30) missing for area 01 ch. of deprec. 1000Message No. ACC_AA116
entry.content:
Working in an S/4'HANA on prem version 2023. When trying to maintain Company Code in Asset Accounting I get the message ACC_AA116. I checked several times the Customizing of GL and AA but could not find the currency settings for crcy type 30 for area 01. I have checked knowledge base article 2307443 but couldn't find the error.
Transaction FINSC_LEDGER looks like screenshot "finsc_ledger_glob_curr", 
"curr_conversion" and "company code settings for ledger". 
Can anybody give me a hint to solve this problem?
Kind regards

entry.title: Re: CIS (Cloud Identity Services) - IAS & IPS
entry.content: Please use abbreviation SCI, not CIS. At least in the BTP context, CIS usually means "commercial infrastructure services", i.e. BTP account management.

entry.title: How to transport recurrent calendar Tasks between 2 different SAC Tenants
entry.content:
Some SAC customers asked me if it would be possible to transport recurrent calendar tasks (like data/multi actions tasks) cross tenants.

With the Q4.2024 SAC release (Plan Process Management - template support) it is possible but there are some steps that need to be followed in order to do that.

First you need to create a process on the Source Tenant and include the Data/Multi Action tasks within that (You will need to remove the recurrence to do that):

After creating the process, please create any general task with the left checkbox for the process selected:

You can select the Context Model for the task

Select the process again and now click on Save as Template

Save it on the folder that you are planning to transport (where the model and other objects are located)

Now it can be selected as an object for export within the transport menu

Proceed with the transport as usual and you will see the template saved on the target tenant:

Open the Process Template and click on Create Process from Template:

Now you should have a process with the calendar tasks on your calendar:

If you need to put recurrence on the calendar task you should remove the parent dependency from it:

OR

Now the Add Recurrence button should be enabled:

Configure the recurrence as required and update the task

The generated process can be deleted in case you don’t need it anymore:

Go to the Series Menu and rename it accordingly

Now you should have your Calendar Tasks transported properly.
For more information on this topic please check Work with Calendar Templates - SAC Help page

entry.title: Re: is there a way to maintain or upload custom css files...
entry.content:
Hi Mahesh,

The only way to achieve this level of control would be through a custom widget, allowing you to inject css directl to the platform. This could be risky as it may impact other UI elements so you would want to be careful with this approach. Below I have provided sample code for a custom widget that would enable this:

cssinject.json:

{
	"id": "com.sap.sample.cssinject",
	"version": "1.0.0",
	"name": "CSSInject",
	"description": "Inject custom CSS into the page",
	"newInstancePrefix": "CSSInject",
	"icon": "/cssinject.png",
	"vendor": "SAP",
	"eula": "",
	"license": "",
	"webcomponents": [
		{
			"kind": "main",
			"tag": "com-sap-sample-cssinject",
			"url": "/cssinject.js",
			"integrity": "sha256-Ltwh39JeN5eaRtv2+Dt1r7dOgaG4CSiAJekTwHARm9A=",
			"ignoreIntegrity": false
		},
		{
			"kind": "builder",
			"tag": "com-sap-sample-cssinject-builder",
			"url": "/cssinject_builder.js",
			"integrity": "sha256-Q4vxnL/nIKeKPbqECKpc8chOlN6rYKjQvN9INBdcezI=",
			"ignoreIntegrity": false
		}
	],
	"properties": {
		"customCSS": {
			"type": "string",
			"description": "Custom CSS to apply",
			"default": ""
		}
	},
	"methods": {
		"setCustomCSS": {
			"description": "Sets the custom CSS",
			"parameters": [
				{
					"name": "css",
					"type": "string",
					"description": "The new CSS to apply"
				}
			]
		},
		"getCustomCSS": {
			"returnType": "string",
			"description": "Returns the currently set custom CSS"
		}
	},
	"events": {
		"onCSSChange": {
			"description": "Triggered when custom CSS is updated."
		}
	}
}

Then the supporting files are in the archive I have hosted on GitHub: https://icamac.github.io/SAC/customwidgets/cssinject/Archive.zip

Once you have installed the custom widget on your SAC tenant, you will see a new custom widget. Adding this widget to your story (the widget itself is invisible) will allow you to open the builder panel, where you can enter any custom css for your story:

I hope this is useful.

Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Setup Synthetic user Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM with On-Prem Runner
entry.content:
Hi @Madhuviswanath,
Since it is also possible for different 3rd party cloud providers, I suppose in theory it should also work with different on-prem webdrivers. However that would need some try-and-error work.

entry.title: impex and default value for usergroup
entry.content:
I want create an impex that create a set of users.

My issue is on set the default value for the attribute groups

This is the header:

UPDATE Employee ; uid[unique = true]; name ; groups(uid)[default = myUserGroup][mode=append] ; password[default = $defaultPassword] ; sessionLanguage(isocode)[default=$defaultLanguage] ; sessionCurrency(isocode)[default = $defaultCurrency]

 the predicate [default = myUserGroup][mode=append] don't have any effect.

  • myUserGroup exists,
  • i'm using the append mode
  • others default works fine

If I wrote the groups line by line it works fine.

What's wrong?

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML in India 2025-03 Recap
entry.content:
At the beginning of March 2025, as part of the ML/AI Tour my fellow dev advocate @noravonthenen and I did in India, we held five SAP CodeJam events in Kolkata, Pune, and Bengaluru.

Two of these events focused on getting started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python.

Equally important were chances to catch up with some organizers and participants in informal post-work settings...

...or with our SAP colleagues.

I am glad Nora and I could help so many participants to go through the journey of improving their skills working with ML and AI!

Traditionally, I very much enjoyed SAP Stammtisch at the end of the last CodeJam of the Tour.

#IamSAP 

I always take the opportunity to experience at least a little bit of the city I am in, so you can see my photos:

  • Kolkata: https://www.instagram.com/p/DG1wL0OydCp/ 
  • Pune: https://www.instagram.com/p/DG75rf0MPkt/ 

Now, the next stop for me is in Kraków on April 3rd.

Would you like to host such an SAP CodeJam? Here are the details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-usin...

entry.title: Re: SAP Change Document(CD): Special Scenarios with SOLMAN (Solution Manager)
entry.content: @Surendra_Karma Thanks. I appreciate understanding the circumstances better.
